# Sentorise

> European DTC brand for premium LiFePO4 energy storage batteries — built for RV, vanlife, off-grid solar, and mobile backup power. Smart BMS, Bluetooth monitoring, 5-year warranty, CE / RoHS / UN38.3 certified.

Sentorise designs and sells lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) batteries directly to technically literate customers across Europe. Product lines: Lite (entry 6–50 Ah), Core (100 Ah Group 31 / DIN H8 / Mini variants), and Plus (200 Ah, heated). EUR is the base currency with live GBP/USD conversion; shipping fees are calculated at checkout.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, product positioning, who Sentorise is for.
- [Products](/products): Full LiFePO4 battery catalog with filtering by series, capacity, and price.
- [Accessories](/accessories): Chargers, monitors, cables, and installation accessories.
- [Compare](/compare): Side-by-side specification comparison (up to 3 batteries).
- [Applications](/applications): RV, vanlife, off-grid solar, marine, and backup power scenarios.
- [Why Sentorise](/why-sentorise): Engineering principles, safety standards, brand differentiation.
- [Battery Selector](/battery-selector): Guided tool for choosing the right capacity and form factor.
- [Certifications](/certifications): CE, RoHS, UN38.3 documentation and downloadable test reports.
- [Warranty](/warranty): 5-year warranty registration and lookup.
- [Bluetooth Guide](/bluetooth-guide): 5-step setup for the Sentorise companion app.
- [Support](/support): FAQ, contact channels, datasheets, and installation guides.
- [Blog](/blog): Technical articles on energy storage, off-grid setups, and product use.
- [Stories](/stories): Verified customer case studies and installations.
